title: Minecraft: Promo Edition
description: Ever wanted to experience and live peacefully in the beauty of Minecraft's animated trailers? Look no further! Minecraft: Promo Edition brings that promo and trailer art style directly into your game.
body:
This project aims to perferten the image of the trailers in game. If you want to make it accurate to the 1.21x trailers, turn on Internal on PBR type so it removes the PBR but not hurting the colors. 1.17 and 1.18 trailers only have the PBR.

(if your game crashes, locate the installation directory and delete the whole fabric folder, because if you don't, it'll crash the game.)

Ever wanted to live and play in the trailers? 
Mojang's Trailer Cut Exactly makes the game look like the trailers without hurting your peformance and keeps the lively vibrant high saturated look from the Caves and Cliffs trailer Part 1 and Part 2!

(Put Trailers Vision above Bare bones and Bare bones PBR above Trailers Vision.)

If you are lagging, please lower ur shadowmap to 2048, or 1024. Thank you!
